M1311_NBR_STG4 M1311 (M1309) Number Of Unhealed Pressure Ulcers - Stage IV This field indicates the current number of unhealed pressure ulcers at stage IV. CHAR 2 x x x
M1311_NBR_STG4_AT_SOC_ROC M1311 (M1309) Number Of Unhealed Pressure Ulcers - Stage IV that were present at most recent SOC/ROC This field indicates the current number of unhealed pressure ulcers at stage IV that were present on admission (most recent SOC / ROC). CHAR 2 x x x
